## Identity

Founder of House Quorwyn's fortunes, or such fortune as a spit of eel-poor
coastline afforded before the prices tripled. Quor is gen-0 on the family
tree and mostly remembered for being remembered — a name his descendants
invoke when they need gravitas they haven't earned yet.
